title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents a low-code approach for building AI applications on corporate data using Cloud SQL and AlloyDB. The tutorial demonstrates auto-generated code leveraging Gemini for natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations without requiring AI expertise.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through a low-code path for building AI applications on corporate data using Cloud SQL and AlloyDB. It matters because the approach targets small teams that lack dedicated AI expertise, relying on auto-generated code rather than hand-built pipelines. Concrete takeaways: Gemini powers natural language interfaces, and the demonstrated features include hybrid search, image search, and recommendations.
